8232f92e2989a23d1f678a01b070a49a5cb7a205.summary: FastAPI app scores content via TRIBE v2 model, computes NAA + opinion dynamics, generates PDF audit reports.

a0e6dab075df67affaf5a35d05e6c63f2b0b88c7.summary: Three.js-powered visualization system that renders fMRI activation onto high-resolution cortical surfaces with synchronized animation and interactive controls.

7e8f690fae7145bbc8258616ac857550b45705f2.summary: Experiment framework for training neural encoding models on fMRI datasets across multiple neuroimaging studies (Algonauts, BOLD, language stimuli).

e077f2ca0147a4d1fe15bf7972c73f11103a9c67.summary: ECharts-based visualization components sharing a common theme and SSR-safe wrapper for rendering diverse chart types (scatter, bars, gauges, force graphs, metrics).

39de5e55c61b0d1b46141145c83ffa4f26caeed0.summary: Manages scan results, brain ROI activation state, and audience-specific interpretation of NAA metrics for visualization.

e83317854eed9326e277c7efdd07f02a86c92fb3.summary: Plotting module for cortical and subcortical brain regions using matplotlib, nilearn, and pyvista backends.

cb89471215ac5e5172de61e539c832e53fe804fd.label: Inference API Core
cb89471215ac5e5172de61e539c832e53fe804fd.summary: FastAPI inference server infrastructure with API key authentication, rate limiting, and TRIBE v2 model lifecycle management.

38de95e34568a483894bca6e5816491f94f5c7e6.summary: Scan operations enforced with user ownership verification and rate limiting across mutations.

7407ddbe15bed9f1a7475126eaa40e6f99e92e99.summary: Auto-generated type definitions for Next.js image and environment APIs.

8b3977eab98e03cf585114bf9571f61eac1147a4.summary: Web application configuration with production optimizations and security headers for Docker deployment.

5bdc5d4cbe67a5bd2751241b82590fcce05724f7.summary: PostCSS configuration that processes Tailwind CSS for the web application.

ce4b8de2a2975b2f47ef2b64922a2ebf77173cdf.summary: Configures Tailwind CSS content paths and theme variables for the Next.js web app.

c06868fd736a645aefa9ac7280d9c05cd5cc528a.summary: Convex query that retrieves remaining and maximum credits for a user by Clerk ID, defaulting to zero if user not found.

8721116ea9c350ce7768e87932205af287e07298.summary: Next.js app shell setting up Clerk auth, Convex backend, scan provider, and global styles with header component.

e22b690122de159afa38e3cc472e4df4df788a17.summary: Next.js client component rendering home page with Phosphor icon imports for feature showcase.

ea01f29e0732b428642d4cc6a3660d378124b89a.summary: Computes per-face grey palette from sulcal depth to render 3D brain surface with uniform polygonal shading.

3c15d57354bdad2eaa368056922fee113ca20661.summary: Reusable button component for toggling guide visibility in the BrainViewer interface.

06e1a40e3a103d7fe51720ab829ade45e339b736.summary: Explainer component that displays NAA classification levels (LOW/MOD/HIGH) with associated affinity and deletion metrics.

cf56ad0da289b4948a40570df0e06404b4c67cf0.summary: Footer component displaying methodology disclaimers for neuroscience result views.

2166140a5ba1b964739cf14f1852b8a02e54230a.summary: UI component for selecting demographic categories in scanner with dropdown interaction.

1cb14beb60c656bfbf2f364277abfe04b0d6222e.summary: React component props for rendering scan results with audience-specific takeaways and loading state.

811be07f480a0ed6f38537d9cbb18d4d5f934b5f.summary: Component for uploading and visualizing batch text analysis results in a scatter chart.

0d7c27951ed1f256d314e1832b22c05deadd9349.summary: Tab component for displaying and comparing scan results with demographic charts and element cards.

b8a7953dfe338ed4dd041fd94dbcd6d1be112b55.summary: Utilities for loading fsaverage5 pial surface vertex positions and generating spatially coherent brain activation data.

af7ba264a6ccfc4e94d3c099b188e122f8ec1aea.summary: Client provider setup combining Convex backend client with Clerk authentication, guards against missing deployment URL.

8dd9c4818080929e89ce85e283c215292db80e02.summary: Interprets per-modality neural activity from TRIBE v2 encoders (text/audio/video) mapped to cortical networks.

4596e659411e036c8cab11a63e903f86a9881e81.summary: Defines classification types (LOW/MOD/HIGH) and human-readable labels (Neutral/Mixed/Reactive) for assessment scoring shared between scanner and reports.

80c7a5f5e8802c9f3d2cec0ec4c997ed929e53dd.summary: Percentile-based robust normalization utility for rescaling visualization data to [0,1] range.

c08f81f25340b9df31a429d976ca2b4fef1acb41.summary: Manages metadata and descriptions for 17 brain regions in the Show Guide overlay, organized by neural system types (affective, deliberative, sensory, social).

d006c34590381d7e562ae3c8e869c48a6b8cbc52.summary: Utilities for stripping HTML and preventing XSS attacks in user-provided scan text.

f960cfb5698bfbd4a3a2e58ec04e5961fc88c9fc.summary: Identifies media platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Spotify, etc.) from URLs for client-side categorization.

dafaa7dfaaffd16897489ea297ebc75b0210aab1.label: Inference Security
dafaa7dfaaffd16897489ea297ebc75b0210aab1.summary: Security middleware for the inference server request pipeline.

e92a7af365bf351dc4d96b0d40fd02d61778f860.label: Request/Response Models
e92a7af365bf351dc4d96b0d40fd02d61778f860.summary: Pydantic models and enums defining schema for inference service API requests and responses.

5ed571d83038a47b4a82e61197096498c6287a75.label: Report Chart Rendering
5ed571d83038a47b4a82e61197096498c6287a75.summary: Matplotlib chart renderers that generate PNG bytes for PDF report embedding with unified monochrome-plus-fire styling.

3aa9ee03795205f43a9f8979c1e040e2459fbb10.summary: Checkpoints batch inference progress using memory-mapped arrays and JSON tracking to resume from failures without reprocessing completed items.

0a09d14eaa3b2c8241d9f4a89c3ba1a9cc3c74d9.summary: Thin wrapper layer enforcing limits and extracting formats (language, timestamps, frames) from text, audio, and video inputs for TRIBE v2 processing pipeline.

c3f8b4df27fdcd768c13f7a2f24e19e7f3155545.summary: Lower-level helpers for preprocessing, file handling, and batch checkpointing in the inference service.

71771947aee30b907c035f87b80be00b93922820.summary: Pre-computes HCP MMP1.0 ROI vertex-index cache to enable fast API server lookups without tribev2 import overhead.

73d18900d1bedad26e377a2dfc83edb0ac7b7475.summary: Estimates opinion-dynamics coupling parameter from neural arousal asymmetry via empirical regression.

da7f2c4daa672274f923e3235ddb4e2c9aaa05aa.summary: Exports HCP brain region-of-interest vertex indices from fsaverage5 mesh to backend cache and frontend visualization.

a5c2659748e34a1ea6b0334b56429c42cb4e98a4.summary: Generates and geometrically validates medial-wall masks for fsaverage5 brain surfaces from FreeSurfer data.

b108fd1a8fda9ee194a508621c9180eb0dae2669.summary: Creates lookup maps for expanding low-resolution brain surface data onto high-resolution meshes using nearest-neighbor geometry.

5d04c460f9349a754a38e8a0eb409d025117e356.summary: Script pre-downloads ML model weights (gTTS, WhisperX, LLaMA, Wav2Vec-BERT) to mounted cache before inference serving to eliminate request-time download latency.

906cffe9d7addad33de30cca03a19215f9215d40.summary: Smoke test that verifies deployment environment health for TRIBE v2 inference by checking Python/GPU/model dependencies and running a single prediction round-trip.

157fd4e4cc02bd0532a518c0d3eb5292c03f30e9.summary: Pytest configuration providing shared test fixtures for inference tests, including ROI cache mocking to avoid tribev2 dependency.

ce7e2b08cc0c2381578d38a899202624d4d6bb94.summary: Smoke test verifying app startup and health endpoint work with model loading disabled.

fa63b1fd66a83b3ca004d6bbc0039fd9c9d3613e.summary: Tests for APIKeyMiddleware authenticating requests via API keys in the inference service.

2e422ee90b0c643aad0e49f708ac419b0866f816.summary: Tests in-memory blob storage and numpy array serialization/deserialization for inference services.

61b52e701cfc6bde430f7a3857f7346e7757f136.summary: Unit tests for TribeInferenceService covering structural paths; GPU model load/predict tested via deployment smoke test.

f6f30633e2b94b67a8d8ea54ddec63f99dc54121.summary: Test suite for Landau theory phase-transition calculations—equilibrium magnetization, susceptibility curves, physics math independent of external services.

0ae11fda8ba13f8a994a016729cf5b0d0fc179c6.summary: Unit tests for neural analysis computation using cached ROI data fixtures.

94c8ae3f9d30149fd8c815151e24975a657feac0.summary: Unit tests for aggregation functions (mean, peak, trimmed-mean pooling) on prediction tensors in the inference service.

2391c01a6cd6ab67d836a860bdc47e51769f507c.summary: Token-bucket rate limiting middleware tests for FastAPI services with configurable refill rates and proxy trust.

2187a59627f235b775802da78ac9559e8588cb41.summary: Tests disk-cache fallback path for ROI service inference, with integration tests for live tribev2 lookup skipped if dependencies unavailable.

f68ccc9ca2c9a6f0f78836634116f3ad57a651b6.summary: Tests timeseries endpoint playback by injecting frames directly without model dependency.

b8243c5a86154554995f37a8c139dd67ab42340e.summary: Utilities for TribeModel inference demonstrations and event DataFrame construction.

c30b9d0694c7a2d422bc7a83edc6f8924381fac3.summary: Exposes TribeModel from tribev2 inference service as package entry point.

096eafab95cfdeda57bf3df4aa6772921088b1d0.summary: Grid configurations and defaults for TRIBE v2 neuroscience experiments.
